steps.title: Identify the defining moment
steps.content: The strongest clue is the phrase “wakened suddenly from a beautiful dream,” which describes a JARRING, ABRUPT transition from being immersed in sleep to consciousness.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the answer
steps.content:
”Abruptly” precisely expresses the jarring, unexpected transition described in “wakened suddenly from a beautiful dream.” The other three choices misalign with this meaning; they suggest recurrence, voluntary action, or gentleness, none of which fit the abrupt jolt of waking.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
